_do_not_edit_via_swarm: This file is the F1 regression-gate baseline. Operator-only updates. SELF_CRITICAL-protected at the .swarm/ prefix in beefcake-swarm's pre-commit gate.
_gate_semantics: Schema v2 (2026-05-14): multi-metric gate. A PR fails the regression gate if ANY of {macro_f1, macro_precision, macro_recall} drops by more than tolerance_*_absolute OR fp_per_spectrum rises by more than tolerance_fp_per_spectrum_absolute, on ANY identifier. Schema v1 only checked macro_f1.

alias_v2._note: Phase D promotion of ftp1+dj6y per docs/research/findings/2026-05-14-v2-empirical-07-alias-fix-sweep.md. Numbers below captured on the v2 sweep corpus (dataset-shard 1/3 + vrabel-max-shots 1), NOT the original n=33 baseline shape — these are NOT directly comparable to the alias row above. The strict `alias` baseline is unchanged.
